description_long: This sculpture depicts a reclining abstract human figure, rendered in a dark, metallic material. The figure is positioned on its side atop a rectangular stone plinth, with one arm bent and raised above the head and the other arm extended outward. The form is stylized, with simplified anatomical features and a smooth, flowing surface. The base is bordered by a patch of green, possibly representing grass or moss, and is surrounded by a scattering of fallen leaves. A small plaque is visible at the foot of the plinth, suggesting the presence of identifying information. The overall composition conveys a sense of relaxed repose and artistic abstraction.
description: A reclining abstract human figure in dark metal rests on a rectangular stone plinth, bordered by greenery and fallen leaves, with a visible plaque at the base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the reclining figure, with the raised arm and extended legs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the face, chest, and outstretched arm of the figure, as well as the plaque at the base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the figure's back and the curvature of the body, with both legs and the bent arm visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the figure and the extended arm, with the plinth and greenery framing the sculpture.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is installed outdoors on a stone plinth, surrounded by a border of greenery and fallen leaves, suggesting a park or landscaped urban area.
